Holdstation Utility GOLD

UGOLD

Holdstation, the zkSync-native Smart Wallet, is reshaping the trading landscape. With the ability to trade futures at 500x leverage, alongside cutting-edge account abstraction features, we are bringing the best of CEX to the decentralized world.
